onboarding.step0Title: Welina mai i ka Algorithm HŇć Ľike
onboarding.step0Body1: KŇćkua kńďia mea hana ińĀ  Ľoe e ana i ke  Ľano o kńĀu no Ľono Ľo, nńĀ ma Ľamau, a me nńĀ hana i kńďlńĀ me kńďia lńĀ me ka ho ĽokŇć  Ľana i kńĀu mau pahuhopu. E pane pololei i kńďlńĀ me kńďia nńęnau no ka loa Ľa  Ľana o kńĀu helu i kńďia manawa.
onboarding.step0Body2: E ho Ľopiha i ka nńęnau nńęnau i nńĀ manawa ma Ľamau e nńĀnńĀ i kou ulu  Ľana i ka manawa a  Ľike i nńĀ wahi e pono ai ka nńĀnńĀ.
onboarding.step1Title: Pehea e hana ai ka helu helu
onboarding.step1Body: Pono kńďlńĀ me kńďia nńęnau i kahi helu helu. E helu ińĀ  Ľoe iho ma ka pńĀlńĀkiŇć o¬†1‚Äď10 no kńďlńĀ me kńďia nńęnau.  ĽO ka helu o 10,  Ľo ia ka mea e ho Ľokomo piha  Ľoe i kńďlńĀ kumu;  ĽO 1 ka mana Ľo  Ľa Ľole  Ľoe i ho Ľomaka.
onboarding.goodNote: Pa Ľa pa Ľa - lumi e ulu ai
onboarding.needsWorkNote: E no Ľono Ľo mua i nńĀ kumu
onboarding.step2Body1: MńĀlama  Ľia kńĀu mau pane ńĀpau a me ka mŇć Ľaukala helu ma kńĀu kelepona me ka ho Ľohana  Ľana i kahi waihona SQLite i ho Ľopili  Ľia.  ĽA Ľohe mea i ho Ľouna  Ľia i kekahi kikowaena me kńĀu  Ľae  Ľole.
onboarding.step2Body2: ĽO ka hi Ľohi Ľona ka Ľana like peer-to-peer e  Ľae ińĀ  Ľoe e  Ľike i nńĀ helu hŇć Ľulu Ľulu inoa  Ľole mai nńĀ mea ho Ľohana  Ľńď a Ľe. Ka Ľana wale ia i kahi hŇć Ľulu Ľulu helu cryptographically -  Ľa Ľole loa kńĀu pane ho Ľokahi.
onboarding.readyText: MńĀkaukau? E ki Ľi kńĀu helu kumu.
onboarding.skipIntro: Ho Ľoku Ľu i ka ho Ľolauna

sharing.title: Ka Ľana like pŇęnaewele  Ľike  Ľole
sharing.description: E hńĀ Ľawi inoa  Ľole i kńĀu mau hopena i ka pŇęnaewele puni honua.  ĽA Ľohe inoa, leka uila, IP address, a i  Ľole ID hńĀme Ľa i ka Ľana like  Ľia.
sharing.enabled: Hiki ke ka Ľana like - hńĀ Ľawi i ka pŇęnaewele
sharing.disabled: Ua pio ka ka Ľana like  Ľana (pa Ľamau)
sharing.activeBadge: ‚úď Ke hŇć Ľike  Ľia nei kńĀu helu inoa  Ľole me nńĀ hoa
sharing.enableNote: Hiki ińĀ  Ľoe ke  Ľike i kńĀu pae pńĀkńďneka i ho ĽohńĀlikelike  Ľia me ka pŇęnaewele puni honua.

resume.continueLastSession: E ho Ľomau i ke kau hope?
resume.historicalBody: Ua ho Ľouka mua  Ľia kńĀu mau pane mai kńĀu kau kau hope. Makemake  Ľoe e mńĀlama i kńďlńĀ mau waiwai ma ke  Ľano he kumu ho Ľomaka, a i  Ľole e ho Ľomaka me kahi nńęnau nńęnau blank loa?
resume.activeBody: He kau kńĀu e holo nei. Makemake  Ľoe e ho Ľomaka i kahi ńĀu i ha Ľalele ai, a i  Ľole e ho Ľomaka i kahi loiloi hou?
resume.clearWarning: ‚ö†ÔłŹ E holoi  Ľia kńďia i nńĀ pane o kńďia manawa. He  Ľoia Ľi Ľo kńďnńĀ?
resume.keepLastValues: E mńĀlama i nńĀ waiwai hope
